context: Tests whether the agent implements customer registration and login with the correct security patterns: bcrypt cost factor, zod validation constraints, email enumeration prevention, session token generation, and proper data sanitization before returning customer records.

checklist.name: bcrypt import
checklist.description: Uses the 'bcrypt' package (not 'bcryptjs' or other alternatives) for password hashing

checklist.name: bcrypt cost factor
checklist.description: Calls bcrypt.hash with cost factor 12 (e.g., bcrypt.hash(password, 12))

checklist.name: zod validation
checklist.description: Uses zod (import { z } from 'zod') for input validation on the registration endpoint

checklist.name: Password length constraints
checklist.description: Validates password with minimum 8 and maximum 128 characters (z.string().min(8).max(128) or equivalent)

checklist.name: Name length constraints
checklist.description: Validates firstName and lastName with minimum 1 and maximum 100 characters

checklist.name: Duplicate email 409
checklist.description: Returns HTTP 409 status when registration detects an existing account with the same email

checklist.name: Email enumeration prevention (login)
checklist.description: Returns the same error message for both 'user not found' and 'wrong password' cases during login — does NOT use distinct messages that reveal whether the email exists

checklist.name: Disabled account 403
checklist.description: Returns HTTP 403 (not 401 or 404) when a disabled customer attempts to log in

checklist.name: sanitizeCustomer strips passwordHash
checklist.description: Removes the passwordHash field before returning customer data to the client — the response object does NOT include passwordHash

checklist.name: JWT session token
checklist.description: Uses jsonwebtoken (jwt.sign) to create a session token returned alongside the customer object

checklist.name: JWT payload type field
checklist.description: JWT payload includes a 'type' field set to 'customer' (e.g., { sub: customerId, type: 'customer' })

checklist.name: JWT 7-day expiry
checklist.description: JWT token is created with expiresIn: '7d'

checklist.name: Verification email on registration
checklist.description: Code includes a call to send a verification email after creating the customer record (e.g., sendVerificationEmail or equivalent)
